g.text: Deadline Propagation -- the budget shrinks at every hop
Client sets one absolute deadline. Each gRPC hop receives the REMAINING budget. The deepest service knows exactly how much time it has.
Happy path -- budget propagates, deepest service finishes within remaining time
Total elapsed: 80 + 50 + 200 + 60 = 390ms. Last hop finishes with 110ms to spare.
Failure case -- OrderService DB is slow, deadline expires mid-flight
DEADLINE_EXCEEDED bubbles back up the tree. Cancellation flows to in-flight handlers; downstream work aborts.
Without propagation: every hop times out independently, downstream services keep working after the client has given up.
